name: NODULAR LYMPHOID HYPERPLASIA
definition: PSEUDOLYMPHOMA = LOCALIZED MASSLIKE FORM OF LIP reactive benign lesion = uncommon localized lymphoid hyperplasia; no progression to

demographics.Path: usually single involvement of small area of lung
demographics.Histo: aggregates of polymorphous large + small lymphoid cells (B and T cells); multiple

dominant_finding: infiltrate typically in central location extending to visceral pleura
discriminating_features: infiltrate typically in central location extending to visceral pleura
NO invasion of adjacent bronchus / pleural space

CXR: well-demarcated dense infiltrate(s) as nodule / mass / masslike consolidation
CT: infiltrate typically in central location extending to visceral pleura
NO invasion of adjacent bronchus / pleural space

clinical.Rx: most patients respond well to steroids initially
